summary: Overall good PR with minor issues.

bugs.issue: Email validation regex is too permissive
bugs.fix: Use a stricter RFC 5322 compliant regex

edge_cases.suggestion: Add an explicit check for empty strings before regex validation

optimizations.description: Compile regex pattern once at module level instead of per-call

security.issue: No rate limiting on login attempts
security.recommendation: Implement exponential backoff or account lockout after 5 failed attempts

positives: Good use of type hints throughout
